prompt: I'm building a project management app and want to use TanStack DB for local-first task management. I need a tasks collection with fields: id, title, description, status (todo/in-progress/done), priority (1-5), assigneeId, and projectId. Tasks should be queryable by project and filterable by status. Set up the collection with Zod schema in src/lib/collections/tasks.ts and create a TaskBoard component in src/features/projects/components/task-board.tsx that uses useLiveQuery to show tasks grouped by status for a given projectId.
